summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Employee Expense Management (EEM) Module - Session #12.1. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly.

fixed_bugs.fix: Updated to use keyword argument 'namespace' instead of positional argument

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API - Login authentication (admin@garment.com)
✅ Backend API - Get expense categories
✅ Backend API - Create expense claim (draft)
✅ Backend API - List expense claims
✅ Backend API - Get claim detail
✅ Backend API - Submit claim for approval
✅ Backend API - Approve claim
✅ Backend API - Disburse claim with GL posting (JE-EXP-20260529-0001)
✅ Backend API - Create travel request (draft)
✅ Backend API - List travel requests
✅ Backend API - Get travel request detail
✅ Backend API - Get per diem calculation preview
✅ Backend API - Submit travel request for approval
✅ Backend API - Approve travel request with cash advance
✅ Backend API - Mark cash advance as paid
✅ Backend API - List per diem rates (3 default rates found)
✅ Backend API - Update per diem rate (Luar Kota)
✅ Backend API - Get my expense summary
✅ Backend API - Get overall expense summary
✅ Backend API - Get pending approval list
✅ Frontend UI - Login successful
✅ Frontend UI - Navigate to HR Portal
✅ Frontend UI - 'Klaim & Perjalanan Dinas' tab found and clickable
✅ Frontend UI - All 4 EEM sidebar menu items present (Klaim Biaya Saya, Perjalanan Dinas Saya, Approval Klaim & Dinas, Konfigurasi Per Diem)
✅ Frontend UI - Klaim Biaya Saya page loads with stats and 'Klaim Baru' button
✅ Frontend UI - Perjalanan Dinas Saya page loads with stats and 'Request Baru' button
✅ Frontend UI - Approval Klaim & Dinas page loads with stat cards and filter tabs
✅ Frontend UI - Konfigurasi Per Diem page loads with 3 rate cards (Dalam Kota, Luar Kota, Luar Negeri)
✅ Frontend UI - Per diem rates display correctly with Edit/Konfigurasi buttons
✅ Integration - Expense claim created via API appears in frontend list
✅ Integration - Travel request created via API appears in frontend list
✅ Integration - Per diem rate update via API reflects in frontend

navigation_verified: HR Portal accessible from portal selector
'Klaim & Perjalanan Dinas' tab visible in top tab bar
All 4 EEM menu items visible in sidebar
Each module loads correctly when clicked
Stats cards display correctly on each page
Action buttons (Klaim Baru, Request Baru, Edit) are present and visible
data_flow_verified: Expense claim workflow: draft → submitted → approved → posted (with GL JE)
Travel request workflow: draft → submitted → approved → advance_paid
Per diem configuration: list → update → reflects in travel request calculation
Summary endpoints return correct counts and amounts
Pending approval list aggregates both claims and travel requests
skipped_tests: File upload for receipt base64 (as per agent_to_agent_context_note)
Finance Portal 'Klaim Karyawan (Disbursement)' menu (not critical for MVP, backend endpoint working)
